response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the first song. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the Reference JSON for 'I can't control myself'; transitioned to 100% manual transcription and translation for the mid-video dialogue and the second song '未来島 ～Future Island～' (as it was not in the reference scene data). 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to handle the rapid-fire rap segments in '未来島 ～Future Island～' and the overlapping dialogue during the screenshot segment.

subtitles.original: 決められないままで戸惑い 溢れて しまうよ
subtitles.english: Without being able to decide, bewilderment overflows.

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it many times.

subtitles.original: 神様に願いをかけて
subtitles.english: I offered my prayers to God,

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: repeating them over and over.

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: The world, the world... I'm waiting for it to open.

subtitles.original: もうなんにも いらないから
subtitles.english: Because I don't need anything anymore...

subtitles.original: 零れた想いは幻
subtitles.english: those spilled thoughts were but an illusion.

subtitles.original: もう何度も繰り返した
subtitles.english: I've already repeated it many times.

subtitles.original: 神様に願いを かけて何度も繰り返して
subtitles.english: Praying to God, I repeated it many times.

subtitles.original: 世界 世界 開くのを待っている
subtitles.english: The world, the world... I'm waiting for it to open.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeaaaah!

subtitles.original: 最初のゲストはAZKi先輩です！
subtitles.english: Our first guest is AZKi-senpai!

subtitles.original: AZKi!
subtitles.english: AZKi!

subtitles.original: 右手にマイク、左手に地図、あなたのハートにゼロゲッサー、
subtitles.english: Mic in my right hand, map in my left, I'm the GeoGuessr of your heart,

subtitles.original: カリオペちゃん、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Calliope-chan, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！Birthday Desu! 誕生日です！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! It's my birthday! It really is!

subtitles.original: 誕生日カル！
subtitles.english: Birthday Calli!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。さっき一緒に歌った曲大好きです！
subtitles.english: Thank you. I absolutely love the song we just sang!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！なんとAZKiのオリジナル曲を一緒に歌わせていただきました！
subtitles.english: Thank you! We actually just performed one of AZKi's original songs together!

subtitles.original: そうですよね。ずっとバンドアレンジ聴きたかったから選びました！
subtitles.english: That's right. I've always wanted to hear it with a band arrangement, so I chose it!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ熱かったです！
subtitles.english: It was so intense!

subtitles.original: やった！
subtitles.english: We did it!

subtitles.original: 楽しかったよね。
subtitles.english: That was so much fun.

subtitles.original: バンドの演奏も凄かったです！
subtitles.english: The band's performance was incredible too!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Yay!

subtitles.original: ちなみにステージと見てほしい。
subtitles.english: By the way, I want everyone to look at the stage.

subtitles.original: いや凄い！めちゃくちゃピカピカ光ってる！
subtitles.english: Whoa, it's amazing! It's sparkling so much!

subtitles.original: ぴかぴかストーン！
subtitles.english: Sparkling stones!

subtitles.original: ぴかぴかストーン！
subtitles.english: Sparkling stones!

subtitles.original: そうだよね。素敵ですよね。素敵なステージです！
subtitles.english: Right? It's lovely. It's a wonderful stage!

subtitles.original: ちなみにAZKi先輩の誕生石は知ってる？
subtitles.english: By the way, do you know AZKi-senpai's birthstone?

subtitles.original: AZKiの誕生石は... 7月なんですけど、ルビー！ルビー、この色！
subtitles.english: AZKi's birthstone... I was born in July, so it's Ruby! Like this color!

subtitles.original: なりました！凄い！
subtitles.english: It changed! Awesome!

subtitles.original: こっち色が変わるんですね今日は。
subtitles.english: The colors are actually changing here today.

subtitles.original: 凄い！めっちゃ赤です！
subtitles.english: Wow! It's so red!

subtitles.original: そうですね。きれい！
subtitles.english: It is. So beautiful!

subtitles.original: すごくきれいから一緒に何かあの写真撮りたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Since it's so pretty, I'd love to take a photo together!

subtitles.original: 撮りたい！
subtitles.english: I want to!

subtitles.original: 撮りたい！せっかく。
subtitles.english: Me too! Since we're here.

subtitles.original: Take screenshots!
subtitles.english: Take screenshots!

subtitles.original: いい感じです！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Looking good! Yay!

subtitles.original: イェーイイェーイイェーイ！ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Yay yay yay! Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: じゃ、まあ生ライブだからやっぱ水飲みたいと思う。
subtitles.english: Well, since it's a live concert, I think I need some water.

subtitles.original: 水は飲もう！
subtitles.english: Let's drink some water!

subtitles.original: Yes, 水乾杯です！
subtitles.english: Yes, a water toast!

subtitles.original: はい、ども乾杯！
subtitles.english: Yes, cheers everyone!

subtitles.original: Cheers! Cheers!
subtitles.english: Cheers! Cheers!

subtitles.original: Okay okay. やった！次の曲。
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. We did it! Now for the next song.

subtitles.original: お！次の曲は何だろうな？
subtitles.english: Oh! I wonder what the next song will be?

subtitles.original: もう一曲ありますよね、一緒に。
subtitles.english: We have one more song to do together, right?

subtitles.original: あります！そう。そうですね。
subtitles.english: We do! That's right.

subtitles.original: さっきAZKi先輩のオリ曲歌いましたね。今回はカリオペのオリ曲です。
subtitles.english: We sang AZKi's original before. This time it's Calliope's original song.

subtitles.original: 歌わせていただきます。
subtitles.english: We're going to perform it for you now.

subtitles.original: The next song is Calliope's original, "未来島 ～Future Island～"!
subtitles.english: The next song is Calliope's original, "Future Island"!

subtitles.original: 危険な海に浮かぶ島 Head head
subtitles.english: An island floating in a dangerous sea, head head.

subtitles.original: 世界変える未来島のLove call
subtitles.english: A love call from Future Island that'll change the world.

subtitles.original: 最高の知能 叶えるよ願望
subtitles.english: The ultimate intellect will grant your every wish.

subtitles.original: 未来のお宝探しちゃおう
subtitles.english: Let's go search for the treasures of the future.

subtitles.original: 天才が引き起こす発想の奇跡
subtitles.english: A miracle of inspiration brought about by a genius.

subtitles.original: 脳内で終わらせない夢のファンタジー
subtitles.english: A dream fantasy that won't just end in your mind.

subtitles.original: 世界がひっくり返るテクノロジー
subtitles.english: Technology that'll turn the world upside down.

subtitles.original: 大体叶えちゃうラボラトリー
subtitles.english: A laboratory that can grant almost anything.

subtitles.original: 釈迦　リリス　エジソン　ピタゴラス
subtitles.english: Shaka, Lilith, Edison, Pythagoras...

subtitles.original: アトラス　欲　独人のサテライト
subtitles.english: Atlas, York, the satellites of a lone man.

subtitles.original: 湧き出すアイデア止まらない
subtitles.english: Bubbling ideas that just won't stop.

subtitles.original: 忙しすぎて猫の手も借りたい
subtitles.english: I'm so busy I'd even take a cat's help.

subtitles.original: 海も何も超えてゆく海賊を
subtitles.english: Admiring the pirates who cross the seas and beyond,

subtitles.original: 常識超えてゆく発明を
subtitles.english: and the inventions that defy common sense.

subtitles.original: あんな奴らに憧れてきた
subtitles.english: I've always looked up to people like them.

subtitles.original: 次は誰が王になる？
subtitles.english: Who will be the next one to become king?

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, the wisdom of the future.

subtitles.original: 閃きを巻き起こせ
subtitles.english: Stir up a flash of inspiration!

subtitles.original: 無限の夢 未来の知恵
subtitles.english: Infinite dreams, the wisdom of the future.

subtitles.original: 過去も世界も飛び越して
subtitles.english: Leaping beyond the past and the world.

subtitles.original: MEGAPUNK 生み出すよアイデア
subtitles.english: MEGAPUNK, creating ideas.

subtitles.original: MEGAPUNK...
subtitles.english: MEGAPUNK...
